title: KimetsuCraftModpack
description: This is the Kessels pack demon slayer modpack with some additional tweaks to fit our server
body:
This is a take on the kessel's Demon slayer pack that includes a few extra quality of life mods like tree felling, better villagers and inventory management. The demon slayer mod (Created by Orca) brings the world of Demon Slayer into minecraft, it adds breathing styles, new weapons, new mobs and acheivements. It also includes some custom mods that have been created by a player in our community that allows advancement beyond the normal means of the demon slayer mod.
On top of this some mods have been added for better world generation such as terralith and also mods like Alex's mobs to bring a bit more excitement into exploring.
Join our discord with our ip here :) https://discord.gg/qhuHVTKQ
